a: WIJS covers Kindergarten through Grade 12 across all major subjects including Math, Language Arts, Science, and Social Studies.
WIJS offers free practice access. Premium plans unlock full curriculum, detailed analytics, and personalized learning paths.
WIJS tracks every answer and adjusts question difficulty in real time, so students are always challenged at the right level for maximum growth.
WIJS offers Math, Language Arts, Science, and Social Studies. Computer Science for Kids and Coding for Kids are coming soon.

q: Can parents track their child's progress?
a: Yes! The Parent dashboard gives you a full view of your child's activity, skill scores, time spent, and areas that need improvement.

q: Is WIJS aligned to school standards?
a: All WIJS content is aligned to Common Core State Standards and major state standards, so students practice exactly what they need for school.

q: How many skills does WIJS have?
a: WIJS offers 500+ practice skills across all subjects and grade levels, with new content added regularly.

q: Can I use WIJS on my phone or tablet?
a: Yes! WIJS is fully responsive and works on any device — desktop, tablet, or smartphone. Mobile apps for iOS and Android are coming soon.
SmartScore is WIJS's unique scoring system. It rises when you answer correctly and adjusts when you make mistakes, giving you a real-time measure of your skill mastery from 0 to 100.

q: How do I cancel my subscription?
a: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. You'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.
